hooks.prompt: docker-compose file was modified. Recreate containers: `docker compose up -d` or `docker compose down && docker compose up -d` if service definitions changed.
Dockerfile was modified. Rebuild: `docker compose build && docker compose up -d` (add --no-cache for clean rebuild).
nginx.conf was modified. Test and reload: `docker compose exec nginx nginx -t && docker compose exec nginx nginx -s reload`. Ensure proxy_mode = True in odoo.conf.
.env modified. Must recreate: `docker compose down && docker compose up -d` (restart does NOT pick up .env changes).
entrypoint.sh modified. Ensure executable: `chmod +x entrypoint.sh && docker compose build && docker compose up -d`.
